# Smart Expense Tracker

A simple, clean, and efficient **Expense Tracker Web Application** built using **Flask (Python)**, **SQLAlchemy (SQLite)**, and **Bootstrap 5**. This app allows users to manage their daily expenses easily with full **CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete)** functionality.

---

##  Features

* **Total Budget Counter:** Dynamically calculates and displays the total amount spent.
* **Add Expense:** Quick form to add an expense with a Title, Amount, and Category.
* **View Expenses:** A clean, responsive table showing all expenses with auto-generated serial numbers.
* **Update Expense:** Pre-filled edit form to easily modify any past expense.
* **Delete Expense:** Quick delete button with a JavaScript confirmation popup.

---

## Tech Stack

* **Backend:** Python 3, Flask
* **Database:** SQLite, Flask-SQLAlchemy
* **Frontend:** HTML5, Bootstrap 5 (CSS/JS), Jinja2 Templating

---

##  How to Run Locally

Follow these steps to get the project up and running on your local machine:

### 1. Clone the Repository
```bash
git clone [https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/smart-expense-tracker.git](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/smart-expense-tracker.git)
cd smart-expense-tracker
